evals.prompt: How do I set up a multi-channel campaign in Yesware?
evals.expected_output: Step-by-step guide for creating a Yesware campaign with email, phone, and LinkedIn touches.

assertions.name: campaign_setup
assertions.description: Must explain how to create a campaign with multiple touch types (email, phone, LinkedIn, custom)

assertions.name: recipient_management
assertions.description: Must cover adding recipients individually or via bulk import

assertions.name: plan_awareness
assertions.description: Must note campaign recipient limits by plan (10 free, 20 Pro, unlimited Premium+)

evals.prompt: How do I connect Yesware to Salesforce?
evals.expected_output: Salesforce integration setup guide with plan requirements and sync configuration.

assertions.name: enterprise_requirement
assertions.description: Must clearly state Salesforce integration requires Enterprise plan ($65/mo)

assertions.name: sync_details
assertions.description: Must describe bi-directional activity sync (emails, calendar, tasks)

assertions.name: inbox_sidebar
assertions.description: Must mention the Salesforce inbox sidebar feature for viewing CRM data from email

evals.prompt: I want to use Yesware's Prospector to find leads — how does it work?
evals.expected_output: Guide to using Yesware Prospector for finding B2B contacts with search filters.

assertions.name: database_size
assertions.description: Must reference the 100M+ B2B contact database

assertions.name: search_filters
assertions.description: Must describe available search/filter options for finding contacts

assertions.name: prospect_list_pointer
assertions.description: Must reference /sales-prospect-list for broader list-building strategy beyond Yesware
